message:
feat(engine): add 37 deep unit tests to versioned_rewrite_pack and kernel_shift_monitor

- versioned_rewrite_pack.rs: 36→56 (+20) — version compatibility edge cases,
  cost model hash sensitivity, disabled rule handling, catalog multi-pack,
  pack content hash sensitivity, interference symmetry, schema constants
- kernel_shift_monitor.rs: 34→51 (+17) — MMD threshold boundary values,
  aggregate coverage calculation, dimension config defaults, verdict display
  consistency, report hash sensitivity, abstention tags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
